a little pricey. Recommend sharing a variety of dishes.

too much cheese on the salad for me. Unpleasant establishment smell?
i enjoyed the roti with beef rendang

Great pick, amazing food, wish the seats were'nt as tall as me - otherwise 10/10 would go again!
Very busy but personally love this place.

Great house wine, decent price for a combo meal, very filling

Great value, excellent chicken burger and nice chardy
Great vibe, the music was abit loud for conversation but the food was very tasty.

Very good food, quick, cheap and super wholesome! 20s across the board

loved stuffing my face - and I'm now in a food coma, so you could say it went down a treat
So tasty, much value, such goodness.
$20 for a hearty, tasty, spicy meal including a drink. Great value.
Loved the food, vego one was more fragrant on the tongue. Delightful. Would absolutely go again.

Close and tasty!
Great walking distance

Venue: TA Town Square - Le Cordon Vert
Comment: Great vibe on a warm autumn day. Beef was good and well cooked, very filling with the baguette and fries, sauce not so tasty.Felt that $28 for a meet and fries sandwich not the best value
Loved the taste, the vibes and the proximity and ease process in pre-ordering
Loved the meal! Heaps of flavour, super close to work, but a bit spenny and posh
Noodle dish was delicious 10/10, but service wasn't ammmmazing
A little pricey, but delish + flavourful. Loved the peanuts!!
Green chicken curry was nice but a bit expensive at $37 including rice. Stuffed up table's order
Loved the rice noodle rolls! A little on the spenny side
Was IMPRESSED with the mushroom burger. If I'm choosing that over a meat version and didn't regret it - you know it was 10/10
Not bad. No napkins on the table. Staff weren't very attentive to that level of detail.
$18 for a stacked focaccia great value, $11 for a can of Peroni less so.
Enjoyed the leisurely stroll. Thought I ordered what I had last time but I did not which was disappointing but my own fault. Still delicious.
Was such a chill vibe! Very filling and hit the spot!
Good value, but waited a bit too long for a sandwich. I'm bias towards a warm sando and this wasnt hitting for me purely for this reason.
Great walk in Spring time, sandwich was good, something I wouldn't normally have.
Walk on the longer side but well worth it. Pouring water but not giving us menues was a thumbs down
Sando was HUGE, and very tasty. Bit of a mix up at the start with seating, but not their fault.
That was a really great sandwich, probably the best I ever had! Fair proximity for a quick walk before and after a great lunch!
Staff came on a bit strong but hey that's just me as a person. Good sandwiches and love the vibe.
That was a really great sandwich, probably the best I ever had! Fair proximity for a quick walk before and after a great lunch!
Staff dealt with our booking changes well. Reuben style toastie was tasty & filling for $21. $14 for a class of vino OK
The resaurant was very authentic to what I exprienced in Thailand. Taste, decore and staff were perfectly matched to the many places I stayed.
great value for money, food tastes great, price is fair, and close to work, the best is the vibe, makes me feel like in thailand!
Loved the music pumping up the lunch time vibes. Service was quick, food had good spice and overall venue was well designed
Loved the Thai fried rice, very tasty and flavoursome
$32 for a decent basil chilli chicken stir fry and a beer. Forced capture of email address to order is a turn off
$15 for a tasty chicken toastie. Toasted lettuce was a bit questionable though
tasty chicken toastie
Nothin' better than a classic ham & cheese toastie

Was a nice vibe. Meat was delicious. Service points deducted as they didn't need to do much. Great choice.
Delicious meal, quick service, just a tad pricey for a yiros... but it was huge.
Cool and casj vibe. Loved the cheeky chips - the feta garnish is a nice touch!
Delicious - portion size was substantial.  Prefer a traditional garlic sauce to tzaziki on filling - so skewed my vote.
Huge tasty lasagna for $22. Order at counter, and scattergun delivery to table were issues
Very tasty mushroom pizza. Price was on the mark. Good energy environment even if strangers were walking past bumping into us. Was close too!

Love the market vibe, never dined in so was great to do that, taste was great.
I had the schnitzel parmi, with chips, very filling, but i've had tastier schnity parmi's. The market is quite load & busy

$16 Beef Reuben: Beef Pastrami, Saurkraut, Pickles, Cheese, Burger Sauce and Mustard, in their sourdough bread, toasted. tasty. If shade lands on the outdoor seating it's not bad. https://johnny-come-lately.square.site/
$16 for a Reuben that was well packed with pastrami but lacking a little in sauerkraut, $11 for a beer made pretty good value in total
Well stacked, could have had a little bit more balsamic.

Pretty good value overall.  Not too far to walk.  Reuben was substantial - just missing rye and saurkraut.
sandwich too basic for value

$18 for a good portion of spicy chicken nasi goreng.

great proximity, tastes great just a little expansive for mainly rice and vibe average
